headline: A Look At Alexandria Real Estate Equities (ARE) Valuation After FTSE All World Index Removal
summary: Alexandria Real Estate Equities (ARE) was recently removed from the FTSE All-World Index, a move that can prompt index tracking funds to adjust positions and may influence liquidity and trading patterns. See our latest analysis for Alexandria Real Estate Equities. The removal from the FTSE All-World Index comes after a 30 day share price return of a 14.84% decline to US$46.04 and a 1 year total shareholder return of a 48.74% decline, suggesting sentiment and risk perception have weakened...
